reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio YPF en Ojo de Agua ruta 9 camino a Santiago del Estero, tiene muy buen lugar para desayunar, almorzar, cenar y además un complejo de hotel con muy buenas habitaciones

(Translated by Google)
The YPF service station in Ojo de Agua, on Route 9 towards Santiago del Estero, has a very good place for breakfast, lunch, and dinner, and also a hotel complex with very good rooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnek1iUzR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención buena. Pero los sanitarios muy sucios. Las medialunas viejas. Es una lástima. Era un lugar muy lindo

(Translated by Google)
The service was good. But the restrooms were very dirty. The croissants were stale. It's a shame. It used to be a very nice place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBai1UcE53EAE

reviews.comment:
Combustible bien. Baños regulares. Comedor idem.  Lamentablemente no hay nada mejor en 100km a la redonda.

(Translated by Google)
Good fuel. Average bathrooms. Same dining room. Unfortunately, there's nothing better within 100km.
